title: Create Renewable Recipes
body:
Create Balanced Renewable Recipes

I needed really balanced recipes, which no mod/datapack could handle, so I created my own.   
It is now possible to produce brass completely automatically.
And I already added some more recipes, because of "why not?"
And yes, there will be no diamond/netherite craft here.

**All added recipes in 2.0 version:**
